CustomField.description: Reference field for the Onboarding Training Call Completed Date populated on the Account OR SaaS Primary Contact. Shows max date between both records.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.Onboarding_Call_Complete__c)), ISBLANK(SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.Onboarding_Training_Call_Completed__c) ), Account__r.Onboarding_Call_Complete__c, IF( AND( ISBLANK(Account__r.Onboarding_Call_Complete__c), NOT(ISBLANK(SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.Onboarding_Training_Call_Completed__c)) ), SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.Onboarding_Training_Call_Completed__c, IF( Account__r.Onboarding_Call_Complete__c > SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.Onboarding_Training_Call_Completed__c, Account__r.Onboarding_Call_Complete__c, SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.Onboarding_Training_Call_Completed__c ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Reference field for the Onboarding Training Call Completed Date populated on the Account OR SaaS Primary Contact. If SaaS Training Call Completed is blank on the Combined Funnel record, this field can be used to quickly/easily manually populate that field to the correct date on the CF record.
CustomField.label: Onboarding Training Call Completed
